title: Carol Kirkwood Says Goodbye to BBC Breakfast
summary: Carol Kirkwood, a weather presenter, has said an emotional goodbye to BBC Breakfast after 28 years. She told viewers it was a privilege to be in their homes and thanked them for trusting her with weather reports. Carol is leaving to travel more and spend time with her husband Steve. During her last show, she received many good wishes from friends and fans. A guide dog named Flash visited her on set, and she got gifts like a cake and a picture. Carol said she is excited to watch the weather instead of presenting it now.

background_read: Carol Kirkwood is a well-known weather presenter in the UK who has been on BBC Breakfast for many years. This show is a popular morning program where people watch news and weather updates. Carol is loved by viewers for her friendly style. She decided to leave to have more time for personal activities like traveling. Her farewell was a special event with many people wishing her well.

WHY: To travel more and spend time with her husband Steve

perspectives.description: She feels grateful and emotional about leaving after a long career.
